summary: Comprehensive testing of NASSAQ iteration 50 features: Users Management tabs, Independent Teacher Requests filters, School Users list, School Principal Dashboard refresh, Schools Management setup status, and School Draft API. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Health check endpoint returns 404 - endpoint not implemented

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - minor Recharts library warning, does not affect functionality

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed - only health check endpoint missing)

seed_data_creation: Created test draft school via API during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly. Users Management has 3 tabs (المستخدمين, مستخدمو المدارس, طلبات المعلمين المستقلين). Teacher requests have 5 filters. School Principal dashboard has refresh button and auto-refresh every 20 seconds.

users_management_tabs.evidence: Found 3 tabs: المستخدمين, مستخدمو المدارس, طلبات المعلمين المستقلين (with badge showing 11 requests)

school_users_tab.evidence: Shows schools in separate cards (مدرسة الأمل, مدرسة النور, etc.) with users listed inside each card. Each card shows school name, status, city, user count, and action buttons

teacher_requests_filters.evidence: Found all 5 filter buttons: جميع الطلبات, المعتمدين (11), قيد الاعتماد (11), بانتظار معلومات (0), المرفوضين (2)

principal_dashboard_refresh.evidence: Found Refresh button (تحديث البيانات) with data-testid='refresh-dashboard-btn'. Last updated indicator and auto-refresh indicator (تحديث تلقائي كل 20 ثانية) present

schools_management_setup_status.evidence: Found filter buttons: الكل, نشطة, قيد الإعداد. Clicking 'قيد الإعداد' shows schools with setup status (مدرسة اختبار المسودة)

create_user_wizard_account_types.evidence: Found all 3 account types: مدير منصة (Platform Admin), نائب مدير منصة (Deputy Platform Admin), معلم مستقل (Independent Teacher)

create_school_wizard_save_draft.evidence: Found 'حفظ كمسودة' (Save as Draft) button in the Create School Wizard

school_draft_api.evidence: POST /api/schools/draft API working correctly - creates school with status='setup'. Authorization properly enforced (401 for unauthenticated, 403 for non-admin users)

authentication.evidence: Login working for both platform_admin and school_principal roles. Invalid credentials correctly rejected with 401
